/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/joysticks.dir/joysticks.c.o CMakeFiles/joysticks.dir/__/deps/glad_gl.c.o -o ../../../bin/joysticks.app/Contents/MacOS/joysticks  ../../../lib/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
